preferencesDescription: Sarrafa zaɓuɓɓukan aikace-aikacenku da saitunan bayyanar.
themeDescription: Zaɓi tsakanin haske, duhu, ko zaɓin jigogi na tsarin.
languageDescription: Zaɓi harshen da kuke so don dubawa.
systemSettingsDescription: Saita saitunan matakin tsari da zaɓuɓɓuka na ci gaba.
esmUrlDescription: URL na CDN Javascript don shigo da fakitin.
projectTemplateDescription: URL ɗin ma'ajin Git da za a yi amfani da shi azaman samfurin farawa don sababbin ayyuka.
previewDomainDescription: Yankin da ake amfani da shi don sandbox na duba iframe.
corsProxyDescription: URL ɗin proxy na HTTP don ketare ƙuntatawa na CORS.
serviceWorkerNotRegistered: Babu service worker da aka yi rajista a halin yanzu. Ana yin rajista na service workers kai tsaye lokacin da kuka loda aikace-aikacen.
serviceWorkerUpdatedDescription: An sabunta service worker cikin nasara.
serviceWorkerUnregisteredDescription: An soke rajista service worker. Sabunta shafin don kammala aikin.
serviceWorkerCacheClearedDescription: An share duk caches na service worker.
faviconUrlDescription: Samfurin URL don ɗaukar favicons. Masu canji da ake samu: {hostname}, {origin}, {href}, {protocol}, {pathname}
ngitWebUrlDescription: Samfurin URL don ma'ajiyar Nostr Git. Masu canji da ake samu: {naddr}, {npub}, {pubkey}, {identifier}
showcaseEnabledDescription: Nuna sashen nuni na aikace-aikace a shafin gida
showcaseCuratorDescription: Alamar NIP-19 (note1, nevent1, ko naddr1) mai nuni ga wani taron da tagoginsa na p ke bayar da marubutan mai zaɓi
projectsDirectoryDescription: Hanyar tsarin fayil inda ake adana ayyuka
configDirectoryDescription: Hanyar tsarin fayil inda ake adana fayilolin saiti
temporaryDirectoryDescription: Hanyar tsarin fayil don fayilolin wucin gadi
systemPromptDescription: Keɓanta tambarin tsarin mataimaki na AI ta amfani da tsarin samfuri mai kama da Jinja. Wannan yana sarrafa ɗabi'a da ilimi na mataimaki.
name: Suna
selectModelToDescribe: Zaɓi samfuri a ƙasa don farawa...
examplePrompt: Bayyana abin da kuke son ginawa...
aiSettingsDescription: Saita masu samar da AI da maɓallan API
gitSettingsDescription: Saita bayanan shaidar Git don tabbatar da HTTP
nostrSettingsDescription: Saita haɗin relay da zaɓuɓɓukan Nostr
deployButtonTooltip: Saka aikin ku zuwa gidan yanar gizo
cloudSyncButtonTooltip: Haɗa aikin ku tare da Git don adana fayiloli
codeButtonTooltip: Canza zuwa editan code don duba da gyara fayiloli
logsButtonTooltip: Duba saƙonni na console da log daga aiki
storageSettingsDescription: Fitar da fayiloli da sarrafa bayanan gida
emailUpdatesDescription: Yi rajista don karbar sabuntawar Shakespeare da albarkatu
aiAssistantReady: Mataimakin ci gaban ku na AI ya shirya don taimaka muku gina, gyara, da haɓaka aikinku.
askMeFeatures: 💡 Roƙe ni in ƙara sabbin fasaloli
getHelp: 🔧 Sami taimako da gyara kuskure da haɓakawa
aiNotConfigured: Mataimakin AI Ba a Saita ba
askToAddFeatures: Roƙe ni in ƙara fasaloli, gyara fayiloli, ko gina aikinku...
selectModelFirst: Da fatan za a zaɓi samfuri don farawa hira...
buildProjectToSeePreview: Gina aikinku don ganin duba a nan
selectFileFromExplorer: Zaɓi fayil daga mai bincike don gyarawa
unsavedChanges: Canje-canjen da ba a ajiye ba
noFilesFoundSearch: Babu fayilolin da suka dace da bincikenku
repositoryStatusDescription: Duba matsayin repository da haɗawa da repositories na nesa
noCredentialsWarning: Babu bayanan shaidar da aka saita don {{provider}}. Ayyukan tura/ja na iya gazawa don repositories masu sirri.
commitsAhead: Commit {{count}} a gaba | Commits {{count}} a gaba
commitsBehind: Commit {{count}} a baya | Commits {{count}} a baya
uncommittedChanges: Canji {{count}} da ba a commit ba | Canje-canje {{count}} da ba a commit ba
noRemoteConfigured: Babu na nesa da aka saita
filesWithChanges: Fayil {{count}} da canje-canje | Fayiloli {{count}} da canje-canje
noUncommittedChanges: Babu canje-canjen da ba a commit ba
cannotPush: Ba za a iya turawa ba
cannotPull: Ba za a iya ja ba
notGitRepoOrBranch: Ba repository na git ba ko babu reshen yanzu
noRemoteRepositories: Babu repositories na nesa da aka saita
nothingToPush: Babu abin da za a tura
noCommitsAhead: Babu commits a gaban na nesa. Fara commit canje-canjenku.
providerExists: Mai samarwa da wannan suna ya riga ya wanzu
loginToNostrRequired: Shiga Nostr don amfani da wannan mai samarwa
shakespeareDeployNostrAuth: Wannan mai samarwa yana amfani da tabbatar da Nostr. Tabbatar cewa kun shiga don tura.
credentialsExist: Bayanan shaidar wannan asali sun riga sun wanzu
gitIdentityDescription: Idan an saita suna da imel, za a yi amfani da su azaman marubucin aikin. In ba haka ba, za a yi amfani da shakespeare.diy. Lokacin da aka kunna haɗin marubuta, za a ƙara Shakespeare azaman haɗin marubuta.
exportFilesDescription: Sauke duk ayyukanku da fayiloli azaman ajiyar ZIP. Wannan ya haɗa da duk fayilolin aikin, saitunan, da bayanan da aka adana a gida.
clearAllDataDescription: Share duk bayanan gida har abada ciki har da ayyuka, saitunan, da bayanan cache. Wannan aikin ba za a iya sokewa ba.
clearDataWarning: Wannan aikin zai share duk bayanan gida daga wannan burauzar har abada, ciki har da:
actionCannotBeUndone: Wannan aikin ba za a iya sokewa ba. Yi la'akari da fitar da fayilolinku da farko.
filesExportedSuccessfully: An fitar da fayiloli cikin nasara
filesExportedDescription: An sauke fayilolin aikinku azaman fayil zip.
dataClearedDescription: An cire duk bayanan gida. Ana turawa zuwa shafin gida...
persistDataDescription: Nemi ajiyar bayanai ta dindindin don hana asarar bayanai lokacin da ajiyar burauzar ta ragu. Wannan yana taimakawa wajen kare ayyukan ku da saitunan.
persistentStorageGranted: An ba da ajiyar ta dindindin
persistentStorageGrantedDescription: Burauzar ku yanzu za ta kare bayananku daga share mai sarrafa kansa.
persistentStorageAlreadyGranted: An riga an ba da ajiyar ta dindindin
persistentStorageAlreadyGrantedDescripti: An riga an kare bayananku daga share mai sarrafa kansa.
persistentStorageDenied: An ki neman ajiyar ta dindindin
persistentStorageDeniedDescription: Burauzar ku ta ki bukatar. Ana iya share bayanai ta atomatik lokacin da ajiya ta ragu.
persistentStorageNotSupported: Ba a goyan bayan ajiyar ta dindindin ba
persistentStorageNotSupportedDescription: Burauzar ku ba ta goyan bayan bukatun ajiyar ta dindindin ba.
failedToRequestPersistentStorage: Ya gaza neman ajiyar ta dindindin
mirrorsDescription: Shakespeare yana samuwa a URLs masu yawa don inganci da samun dama.
changelogDescription: Duba abubuwan da suka canja a kowane sigar Shakespeare.
pageNotFound: Kai! Ba a sami shafin ba
tryCustomModel: Gwada amfani da samfuri na musamman.
recentlyUsed: An yi amfani da su kwanan nan
invalidApiKey: Maɓallin API na {{provider}} ba daidai ba ne. Da fatan za a duba maɓallin API a cikin Saitunan.
totalCostSession: Jimlar farashi don wannan zaman hira
noAccountsLoggedIn: Babu asusun da aka shiga. Ƙara asusu don farawa.
enterHostname: Shigar da sunan mai masaukin baki (misali: git.shakespeare.diy)
cloneGitRepository: Clone repository na Git zuwa wurin aikin Shakespeare
pleaseEnterRepositoryUrl: Da fatan za a shigar da URL na repository
pleaseEnterValidGitUrl: Da fatan za a shigar da ingantaccen URL na repository na Git ko URI na clone na Nostr (misali: nostr://npub.../sunan-repo)
nostrRepositoryImportedSuccessfully: An shigo da repository na Nostr cikin nasara
repositoryClonedFromNostr: An clone "{{repoName}}" daga Nostr kuma ya shirya don ci gaba.
repositoryImportedSuccessfully: An shigo da repository cikin nasara
repositoryClonedReady: An clone "{{repoName}}" kuma ya shirya don ci gaba.
repositoryNotFoundOnNostr: Ba a sami repository akan hanyar sadarwar Nostr ba. Da fatan za a duba URI kuma a sake gwadawa.
noCloneUrlsFound: An sami sanarwar repository amma babu URLs na clone da ke samuwa.
allCloneAttemptsFailed: An sami repository amma duk URLs na clone sun gaza. Repository na iya zama ba ya samuwa.
repositoryNotFound: Ba a sami repository ba. Da fatan za a duba URL kuma a sake gwadawa.
accessDenied: An hana shiga. Repository na iya zama na sirri ko yana buƙatar tabbatarwa.
networkError: Kuskuren hanyar sadarwa. Da fatan za a duba haɗinku kuma a sake gwadawa.
featuredAppsDescription: Aikace-aikacen da aka zaɓa suna nuna mafi kyawun al'ummarmu
templatesDescription: Samfura masu shirye-shirye don fara aikinku
clickToViewMore: Danna don ganin ƙarin aikace-aikacen al'umma
noAppsFound: Ba a sami aikace-aikace ba. Gwada wani relay?
aiPoweredDevelopmentAssistant: Mataimakin ci gaban ku na AI don gina aikace-aikace na musamman. Kawai bayyana abin da kuke son ginawa, AI zai taimake ku ƙirƙira shi.
shakespeareOpenSource: Shakespeare software ne na buɗaɗɗen tushe wanda ke gudana gaba ɗaya a cikin burauzar yanar gizonku
yourDeviceConnects: Na'urarku tana haɗuwa kai tsaye ga masu samar da AI na ɓangare na uku da kuka zaɓa
filesStoredOnDevice: Ana adana fayilolinku akan na'urarku a cikin burauzar
carefulBrowserData: Yi hankali kada ku share bayanan burauzar ko kuna iya rasa fayilolin aikin
responsibleBackups: Kuna da alhakin ɗaukar madadin ko haɗawa da git
qualityDependsOnInput: Ingancin fitarwa ya dogara da ingancin shigarwa da samfuran da aka yi amfani da su, kuma ba a tabbatar ba
shakespeareNotCloudService: Shakespeare ba sabis na girgije ba ne. Software ne na buɗaɗɗen tushe wanda ke gudana akan na'urarku. Kun yarda da Sharuɗɗan Sabis na masu samar da AI da kuke hulɗa da su. Ana bayar da Shakespeare "kamar yadda yake" ba tare da garanti kowane iri ba.
chooseAIProvider: Zaɓi mai samar da AI ɗinku
selectAIProviderDescription: Zaɓi mai samar da AI don ƙarfafa mataimakin ci gaban ku. Zaku iya ƙara ƙarin masu samarwa daga baya a cikin saitunan.
noModelsAvailable: Babu samfuran da ake samu. Da fatan za a duba haɗinku kuma a sake gwadawa.
noModelsMatchingSearch: Ba a sami samfuran da suka dace da bincikenku ba.
aiAssistantConfigured: Mataimakin AI ɗinku an saita shi kuma ya shirya don taimakawa. Kawai shigar da umarnin ku don fara gina aikace-aikacen Nostr masu ban mamaki.
paymentHistoryAppears: Tarihin biyan kuɗin ku zai bayyana a nan
createGiftCards: Ƙirƙiri Katin Kyauta {{count}} | Ƙirƙiri Katuna Kyauta {{count}}
createGiftCardsToShare: Ƙirƙiri katuna kyauta don raba da wasu
stripeCheckoutOpened: An buɗe biyan kuɗin Stripe a sabon taga.
lightningPaymentSent: An aika biyan kuɗin Lightning ɗinku cikin nasara.
failedToSendLightning: Ya gaza aika biyan kuɗin Lightning
successfullyCreatedGiftCards: An ƙirƙiri katin kyauta {{count}} cikin nasara | An ƙirƙiri katuna kyauta {{count}} cikin nasara.
enterValidAmount: Da fatan za a shigar da ingantaccen adadi.
enterGiftCardCodePrompt: Da fatan za a shigar da lambar katin kyauta.
quantityBetween: Yawan dole ne ya kasance tsakanin 1 zuwa 100.
paymentExpiredMessage: Biyan kuɗi ya ƙare. Da fatan za a ƙirƙiri sabon biyan kuɗi.
failedToCheckPaymentStatus: Ya gaza duba matsayin biyan kuɗi
noActiveGiftCardsToPrint: Ba ku da katuna kyauta masu aiki don bugawa.
failedToOpenPrintWindow: Ya gaza buɗe tagar bugawa. Da fatan za a ba da izinin pop-ups don wannan shafin.
failedToGenerateQRCodes: Ya gaza samar da lambobin QR don bugawa
noActiveGiftCardsToDownload: Ba ku da katuna kyauta masu aiki don saukewa.
downloadedGiftCards: An sauke katin kyauta {{count}} | An sauke katuna kyauta {{count}}.
failedToGenerateCSV: Ya gaza samar da fayil CSV
readyToAddCredits: Shirye don ƙara waɗannan kuɗi zuwa asusunku?
giftCardNotFound: Ba a iya samun wannan katin kyauta.
giftCardAlreadyRedeemed: An riga an fanshi wannan katin kyauta.
deleteLabelConfirmation: Ka tabbata kana son goge lakabi "{{name}}"? Wannan zai cire lakabi daga duk ayyuka.
noLabelsCreated: Ba a ƙirƙiri lakabi tukuna ba
discoverPluginsDescription: Bincika kuma shigar da plugins na Shakespeare da aka raba akan hanyar sadarwa ta Nostr.
noPluginsFound: Ba a sami plugins da suka dace da bincikenka ba.
pluginInstalledDescription: An shigar da plugin "{{name}}" cikin nasara.
noCloneUrlDescription: Wannan plugin ba shi da clone URL da aka saita.
loginToDiscoverPlugins: Shiga tare da Nostr don gano plugins daga mutanen da kuke bi.
noPluginsFromNetworkDescription: Ba a sami plugins daga mutanen da kuke bi ba. Bi masu haɓaka plugins akan Nostr don ganin plugins nasu a nan.
duplicateProjectDescription: Ƙirƙiri kwafin wannan aikin da sabon suna
